title: Nerolac Select Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Nerolac Select Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Nerolac Select Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nerolac Select Capital India:
Nerolac Select Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select Capital India!
